chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4336 of 2019 Naveed Ahmed Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 18993/19 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 06.05.2025 None for petitioner. Ms. Wajeeha Mehdi, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Ch. Muhammad Ashraf Khan for respondent. -.-.- This is an old petition of 2019 which is over six years ago. It was last taken up on 28.06.2019, which is over six years ago. In the last six years learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today learned counsel for the petitioner has called absent without intimation despite lapse of over six years and as such it appears that petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
